title: Bitcoin Payments for Digital Downloads: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria or any other country restricted by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip, you're in good company. Many talented artists, writers, and developers are blocked from selling their ebooks, courses, templates, and digital products online due to KYC requirements or geographic limitations. Getting paid for your digital creations should be straightforward, but it's not. This post breaks down the alternatives and offers a solution.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

The automated delivery pipeline for digital products works in a specific sequence that eliminates every manual step. A buyer visits your store, selects a product, and initiates payment. The Web3 Wallet Connect module displays a QR code with the wallet address and the exact amount in their chosen coin, converted from USD at the current exchange rate. The buyer sends the payment. NOWPayments detects the on-chain transaction and fires a webhook to the Core Shop Engine. The engine verifies the payment amount and confirms the transaction hash on the blockchain. It generates a PDF receipt with the order details and sends the download link to the buyer's email address. The entire process completes in under 30 seconds from payment confirmation.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

To enable Bitcoin payments for digital downloads, we use a combination of technologies. The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration allows buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, generating a multi-chain QR code for easy transactions. The NOWPayments payment processor, with 300+ coins supported, handles the transaction without KYC requirements or buyer account needed. The automated delivery system ensures that buyers receive their digital products instantly after payment.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce's solutions are designed for digital creators who face restrictions on traditional payment platforms. Whether you're an artist, writer, or developer, our system empowers you to sell your digital products to a global audience, without the need for a PayPal account or other payment processor. This means you can focus on creating and selling your digital creations, without worrying about geographic limitations.
Bitcoin payments for digital downloads empower creators to sell their products to a global audience, without geographical restrictions.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard gives you visibility into every aspect of your store's operation. Every transaction appears in the log with the buyer's email, the product purchased, the payment amount in crypto and USD equivalent, the transaction hash for on-chain verification, and the delivery status. You can see at a glance whether the download link was sent, whether the email was delivered, and whether there are any orders requiring attention. Real-time analytics show you which products are selling, where your buyers are located geographically, and what coins they are using for payment. This visibility is what separates a professional digital store from a manual operation — you always know exactly what your store is doing.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start selling your digital products using Bitcoin payments, follow these steps: Set up your shop on the Unchained Commerce platform using the Core Shop Engine, integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet, and configure the Admin Dashboard for real-time analytics. Then, create your digital products and set your prices, and finally, connect your NOWPayments account to start receiving payments. You can also explore additional features and support by upgrading to the Full Stack Bundle.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
The NOWPayments payment processor supports 300+ coins, eliminating the need for a PayPal account or other payment processor.
